sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time (id INT, timestamp_col TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_time (id, timestamp_col) VALUES (1, LOCALTIME);
UPDATE test_time SET timestamp_col = LOCALTIME WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, timestamp_col FROM test_time WHERE timestamp_col > LOCALTIME - INTERVAL '1 hour';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_time WHERE timestamp_col <= LOCALTIME;
